context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: The template now loads the drag stylesheet and renders a grip handle in each floating control; the test must lock in that markup.
implementation: Add assertions for the sailing-drag.css link, the .drag-handle/.grip-dots markup, and that exactly six handles are rendered (one per control), plus presence of layer-panel and action-buttons.
